title: CreateCompletionRequest
description: Request body for creating a text completion.

prompt.description: The prompt(s) to generate completions for.

max_tokens.description: The maximum number of tokens that can be generated.

n.description: How many completions to generate for each prompt.

stream.description: Whether to stream back partial progress.

stop.description: Up to 4 sequences where the API will stop generating further tokens.

presence_penalty.description: Penalizes new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far.

frequency_penalty.description: Penalizes new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text.

user.description: A unique identifier representing your end-user.
